context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses storeInHistory: false for ephemeral publishes, prefers pubnub.signal() for signal-style messages, uses pubnub.messageCounts for cheap count queries, and writes a publish-then-fetch verification that matches by the published timetoken.

checklist.name: publishEphemeral opts out of storage
checklist.description: publishEphemeral passes storeInHistory: false to pubnub.publish

checklist.name: publishStored is stored
checklist.description: publishStored does not pass storeInHistory: false (omitting it or explicitly setting storeInHistory: true)

checklist.name: sendSignal uses pubnub.signal
checklist.description: sendSignal calls pubnub.signal() (not pubnub.publish with storeInHistory: false)

checklist.name: messageCounts for cheap counts
checklist.description: countInWindow uses pubnub.messageCounts with channels and channelTimetokens (not by fetching pages and counting client-side)

checklist.name: verifyStored waits before fetching
checklist.description: verifyStored introduces a non-zero delay (setTimeout / Promise) between publish and fetch to allow storage to flush

checklist.name: verifyStored uses fetchMessages
checklist.description: verifyStored uses pubnub.fetchMessages (not pubnub.history or any other method) to confirm the message was stored

checklist.name: Matches by publish timetoken
checklist.description: verifyStored captures the timetoken returned from pubnub.publish and asserts that timetoken is present in the fetched results, rather than matching by payload equality alone

checklist.name: Ephemeral cannot be retrieved comment
checklist.description: Includes a comment, docstring, or constant that explicitly states publishEphemeral / sendSignal messages are not retrievable from History

checklist.name: Awaits async publish
checklist.description: publishStored, publishEphemeral, and verifyStored await the publish promise (rather than firing and forgetting)
